paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of July 20, 2026, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. that the company will host its second quarter 2026 earnings call on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026. This news may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been several recent SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a Schedule 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and multiple 8-K filings, including one on July 15, 2026, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes due 2031, and another on July 13, 2026, which announced the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
